do_not_merge.reason: Route service variant mismatch: route_b3-2015-sbk-corridor has no determinable variant (unknown), while route_b3-draft-plan is explicitly a Local variant. Per merge canon for routes, different variants never merge with each other or with a variant-unspecified base record by key alone (contradiction test: route service variant differs).

suggestion.rationale: Both records share base route B3 but have conflicting or missing variant specification. The negative signal 'variant mismatch or missing variant: unknown vs local' directly triggers the route variant rule: records with different service variants (or unknown vs known) are distinct and must not be merged.
